subject: Re: June 15 close — agenda + items I need
body: Derek — adding one to Monday's agenda: Midwest Barrel PO (20 barrels @ $295 + freight) lands in Q3. Want to talk depreciation treatment before Janet books it. Also flag whether the anniversary party spend in October should sit in marketing or events.\n\nJacob

subject: ACSA abstract — revised draft attached
body:
Patricia — revised per your notes. Saccharification data leads, terroir section now has the starch-content table from the 2025 test lot. Two questions in the margins about how much TTB formula-approval detail the audience wants.

If it reads clean to you I'll submit before the June 30 deadline.

Jacob
